rows.label: qev055201_MSG0001
rows.name:
A truck belonging to my subordinates
headed toward the Nightglow Forest, but
we've lost all contact with them...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0002
rows.name:
This was a mission by a special team that
included an Orphean, so I left it entirely
in their hands, but... Damn it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_JNK0010
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev055201_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask about the special team.

rows.label: qev055201_JNK0020
rows.name: Mock

rows.label: qev055201_SEL0021
rows.name:
Jokingly say he's going
to be held responsible.

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0003
rows.name:
We sent an Orphean who is familiar with
the Nightglow Forest to accompany them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0004
rows.name:
Since it was our first attempt at
this, we prepared meticulously,
but... What in the world happened...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0005
rows.name:
You're exactly right... Right now,
I'm nothing but useless dead weight
just waiting for contact...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0006
rows.name:
Was it a mistake to let my guard
down just because a reliable
Orphean was accompanying them...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0007
rows.name:
They might have wandered into an area
where the Frontier Net can't reach them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0008
rows.name:
And the worst part is... this was Anna's...
our rookie's very first mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0009
rows.name:
Veteran BLADEs are with her,
too. All I can do is believe
in that faint hope and wait—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0010
rows.name:
Apologies for interrupting
your conversation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0011
rows.name:
Are you... an acquaintance of Kan'otonam,
the one who accompanied them?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0012
rows.name:
Kan'otonam is a divided entity
from the same parent. In
Earthling terms, my brother.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0013
rows.name:
...I predict that Kan'otonam and the others
were chased by native creatures, hid
themselves, and are now unable to move.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0014
rows.name:
For situations like that, the Orphe
have a special type of smoke.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0015
rows.name:
The probability of Kan'otonam and
the others using that smoke is 98%.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0016
rows.name:
It is possible to locate them
by using the smoke as a clue.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0017
rows.name:
However, to locate them, the cooperation
of a highly mobile BLADE is essential.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0018
rows.name:
I don't care what it takes as
long as we can save them. Would
you be willing to help out, too?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0019
rows.name: You have my gratitude as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0020
rows.name:
But if there was smoke like that, I feel
like they would've been found immediately...
There haven't been any reports, you know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0021
rows.name:
This signal is designed to alert only
allies without the enemy noticing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0022
rows.name:
It is impossible to see it
visually without the goggles
we use... Here, take this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0023
rows.name:
With this, you will be able
to perceive the smoke.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0024
rows.name:
Alright, I can see a ray of
hope! I'm counting on you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0033
rows.name:
The team with Anna and Kan'otonam
headed to the Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0034
rows.name:
You and that Orphean's smoke are our
only hope. ...I'm counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0035
rows.name:
So Kan'otonam brought Anna
back safely just like this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0036
rows.name:
It came at the cost of losing
veteran BLADEs, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0037
rows.name:
I am incredibly grateful to
Kan'otonam for saving Anna's life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0038
rows.name:
And of course, to Yin'otonam for
giving us the clue, and to you
for going to their rescue.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0039
rows.name:
We Orphe merely acted according
to the will of the Ovah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0040
rows.name:
It was simply a result that
happened to increase the
Earthlings' probability of survival.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0041
rows.name:
Hmm, the Orphe really are quite
rational... or rather, their way
of thinking is just different.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0042
rows.name:
But that's exactly what
saved Anna. Thank you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055201_MSG0043
rows.name:
As long as the result is positive,
there is no problem. I also offer my
gratitude for Kan'otonam's rescue.[ST:wait ]
